cards.title: ~ delete all adverbs and adjectives in a paragraph, then restore only the needed ones
cards.content: —  📖 Style:  Lessons in Clarity and Grace

cards.title: > As one of my favourite writing professors used to say, -39 points for not having a point.

cards.content:
> Read over your compositions and whenever you meet with a passage which you think is particularly fine, strike it out

— Samuel Jakson
